What's new!

Personal Loan

Whether you're covering unexpected expenses, or pursuing your dreams, our flexible and competitive Personal Loan offers the perfect solution.

Apply for Personal Loan Online - Easy, Fast & Transparent

With Equitas, you can apply for a personal loan online quickly and confidently. Our loans start at an affordable 10.49% interest rate and come with low processing fees. Plus, every loan includes free health insurance, giving you peace of mind. The fully digital application process means no paperwork and instant approvals tailored for salaried professionals.

Top Features of Equitas Personal Loan

Completely digital process and easy application

Loan ranging from Rs. 2 Lakhs onwards

Interest rate starting from 10.49% p.a. to 15% p.a.

Tenure from 1 - 5 years

Flat 1%* processing fee

Our Charges

w.e.f 19th April 2025

Schedule Of Charges

Schedule of Charges for Personal Loan

Parameters

Actual Charges (Excluding GST)

Interest Rate

10.49% p.a. to 15% p.a.

Loan Processing Charges

Upto 3% of loan amount (To be

deducted from disbursement amount)

Cooling period for Loan Cancellation

5 days from date of loan disbursement

(No penalty will be levied for loans

cancelled within cooling period)

Stamping Charges

As per Tamil Nadu State's Stamp Act

Overdue Interest

3% per month on amount overdue

from the due date till the date of

actual payment

Foreclosure/Prepayment charges

Foreclosure/Prepayment of loan will be

allowed after 12 EMIs are paid by the customer

2% on the principal outstanding on the date

of closure

Part Prepayment

Part prepayment is permitted after payment of

6 EMIs. Minimum part payment which can be

paid by the customer is 6 EMIs or 10% of

outstanding principal amount whichever

is higher

2% on the amount part paid by the customer.

Credit Life Insurance

T & C of insurance company would be applicable

for customers taking credit life insurance

Repayment Hierarchy

Unsecured loans would get precedence in the

repayment hierarchy in case of two or more

loans are given to same customer.

NOTE:

  1. Charges are as applicable for the respective Personal Loan product variants as defined by

Equitas Small Finance Bank.

  1. GST and other government taxes applicable as per prevailing rate will be charged over and

above the fees and charges.

FAQs

How to apply for a personal loan?-

You can apply for Equitas personal loan online either through our website or through our Selfe loan App.

Customer Care Toll Free Numbers:

Please contact the relevant toll free number depending on the requirement

Banking related  : 1800-103-1222
Loans/Credit Card related : 1800-103-2977

For Countries outside India : +91-44-6965-4600

Download Mobile Banking

Bank’s transaction monitoring team will call you only from the below numbers to confirm your transactions, please save these numbers - 1600318008 (Domestic) and 04471624173 (International). Also kindly note that incoming call facility is not available in these numbers, you may reach our customer service in the toll free number 18001031222 for any queries.

Always use the customer care numbers displayed on Bank's official website.

DO NOT use any other numbers since this may put you at risk of fraud.

Please be aware of prank and deceptive calls.

Bank will never ask for sensitive information like Card Number, OTP, Password, CVV etc.

This is to inform you that www.equitas.bank.in is the only registered and original web portal of Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited and we do not have web portal in the name of www.equitas.bank.in. Anybody accessing the same will be at their own risk and loss and Equitas Small Finance Bank shall not be held liable under any circumstances for any loss of claim suffered by anybody dealing with the said web portal.
